context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Ledger feature fully working. Payments page has 4 tabs: Outstanding, Payment History, Customer Ledger, MR Approvals. Customer Ledger tab allows searching customers across doctors/medicals/agencies, viewing full ledger with opening balance, invoices, payments, sales returns. Features: edit opening balance, date range filters with Week/Month/Year presets, CSV export, Print, clickable rows for transaction details.
